prompt:
Nowadays there is an opinion, that lots of young people want to get a university degree after graduating school. I think that is a great situation, which shows power of idea to be educated of school students in our time. I completly desagree with the point, that these young people should entire work imediately after finishing school. 

Firstly, I suppose, nowadays level of education in the world is enormously low. And if more people get university degree, life of society will be better in all senses. Our economy will be more powerfull, the crime line will go down, the world sience will grow literally. The reason is simple: accordind to the psyhology the more person is educated, the higher level of moral divelopment he has.

Secondly, I can say that each sphere of our life in connected to sience and level of education. Thus, number of university degrees is propotional to number of qualified workers on factories and fabrics.

messages.content:
You are an expert CEFR writing assessor.
Assess the student text using the provided task/context blocks as supporting evidence.
Use EXPERT_ANNOTATION, CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES, RETRIEVED_ERROR_SPANS, and RANKING_ANCHORS only as supporting context; never override direct evidence from the student text.
Return ONLY one CEFR label from: A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2.
Do not output JSON.
Do not output explanation.

TASK: There is an opinion that too many young people now want to get a university degree. It  would be better for society if most of them start working after finishing secondary school. How much do you agree with this point of view? State your opinion and give at least two arguments to support it.
STUDENT_TEXT: Nowadays there is an opinion, that lots of young people want to get a university degree after graduating school. I think that is a great situation, which shows power of idea to be educated of school students in our time. I completly desagree with the point, that these young people should entire work imediately after finishing school. 

Firstly, I suppose, nowadays level of education in the world is enormously low. And if more people get university degree, life of society will be better in all senses. Our economy will be more powerfull, the crime line will go down, the world sience will grow literally. The reason is simple: accordind to the psyhology the more person is educated, the higher level of moral divelopment he has.

Secondly, I can say that each sphere of our life in connected to sience and level of education. Thus, number of university degrees is propotional to number of qualified workers on factories and fabrics. 
TEXT_TYPE: essay

What is your opinion?","student_text":"The author claims that success is explained only by a hard work. I am absolutely agree with this statement. In our big world each person has some talent. But each talent needs the development to reach success. I think that author means that, when he says that luck has nothing to do with a success. There are many people with the same talents and only the hard work can allow to win in this competition of talents. First and foremost, there are a cases when the person have some talent but not reach a success. My brother was a scientist and he had dreamed about studing in the prestigious foreign university. He was not silly çat all. His inteligence quality score is one hundred and fourty two. But he was lazy and he had not practiced with math. Thus, he had not passed math exam in any foreign university, but it was possible. Last but not the least, some people want to realise their dream so much that any negative circumstances cannot stop it. When my mother was a kid she wanted about be a doctor. Her dream was to be a surgeon, bur she had the disease with hand which made impossible her plans about profession. Surpisingly, now she is a surgeon. Step by step she have been treating her disease and of cource this was a hard work. And, moreover, in all times there were a lot of people who can do work which doesn't need special skills, but there was always a problem to find a really high-qualified professional in some field. So, I think that there is good that a lot of people want to get a university degree.
